mapper.select: SELECT us.id AS userId, us.username AS userName, u.mobile AS mobile FROM sys_user u JOIN sys_user_school_rel us ON u.id = us.user_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT user_id,'0' AS deleted FROM sys_user_dept_rel WHERE deleted = 0 AND school_id = #{schoolId} GROUP BY user_id) udr ON us.id = udr.user_id WHERE us.school_id = #{schoolId} AND u.deleted = 0 AND us.deleted = 0 and us.user_type =1 AND udr.deleted = 0
